verdicts.reason: Correct fcc bulk, *=[2,2,2] supercell, prints cell and 8 atoms.
4-atom 1x1x4 slab + CO ontop = 6 atoms, vacuum set. Correct.
BFGS EMT H2O, prints before/after energy correctly.
Cubic cell so v0^(1/3)=3.589 is true lattice const; B reasonable.
Langevin 100 steps, prints initial/final T and E as asked.
VelocityVerlet NVE, total energy conserved, printed. Correct.
N2 vib gives real 1231 cm^-1 stretch, no imaginary modes.
POSCAR write/read roundtrip, 4 atoms, correct cubic cell.
Octahedron length=5 gives 85 atoms, shape (85,3). Correct.
Al bcc cubic a=3.3, prints cell and Al2 formula. Correct.
Si diamond 3x3x3 = 54 atoms, volume correct.
fcc100 size(3,3,3)=27 atoms, vacuum 12, prints cell. Correct.
bcc110 Fe 2x2x4 = 16 atoms, prints cell lengths. Correct.
surface (2,1,1) 3 layers vacuum 10, prints atoms and 3D cell.
CH4 from G2, prints formula, coords, C-H 1.090 distances.
Manual CO2, get_distances gives [1.16,1.16,2.32]. Correct.
(6,6) nanotube length=4 = 96 atoms, prints cell. Correct.
Icosahedron noshells=3 = 55 atoms, COM ~origin. Correct.
Al(111) 2x2x3 + N2 bridge = 14 atoms, Al=12 N=2. Correct.
Three OH sites, EMT single-points compared, lowest printed. Done as asked.
LBFGS Au cubic already converged, 0 steps and energy printed.
FrechetCellFilter+BFGS, prints true primitive cell and energy before/after.
Prints Steps: True (run() bool) not step count, which task explicitly requested.
Sets dyn.temp in eV not Kelvin; temperature explodes to millions of K.
VelocityVerlet 200 steps, total energy diff tiny, conservation verified.
compressibility=2.1 and no fs timestep; volume blows up 1000x, unphysical.
Primitive cell: reports v0^(1/3)=2.56 as lattice const; true a~4.06. Wrong.
Au xyz write/read, prints symbols and positions as asked.
NaCl CIF roundtrip, spacegroup Fm-3m(225), 8 atoms. Correct.
10-step MD traj, reads 11 frames, last-frame energy printed.
DB write with layers kv, select layers=3 gives 12 atoms. Correct.
Fixes tags<=2, fixed atoms show zero displacement. Correct.
FixBondLength H2, bond held at 0.900, energies printed. Correct.
FixAtoms+FixBondLength, BFGS to fmax, C-O held 1.20, energy printed.
NeighborList natural_cutoffs, avg coordination 12.00 for fcc. Correct.
get_distances mic=True, min 2.553 max 3.610 correct for fcc supercell.
a_eq from primitive v0^(1/3) is too small; slab built strained (energy 67 eV).
Lattice constants from primitive v0^(1/3) all wrong (Cu 1.99 vs ~3.6).
